message:
fix: correct threshold unit mismatch and improve test robustness

- Fix critical unit mismatch in context rotation: config.RotateThreshold
  is 0.0-1.0 but AgentsAboveThreshold expects 0-100 percentage. Without
  this fix, agents would rotate at 0.95% instead of 95% context usage.

- Fix flaky CLI tests that assumed no tmux sessions: add
  sessionAutoSelectPossible() check to skip tests when exactly one
  session is running (which triggers auto-selection).

- Fix UTF-8 truncation in hooks executor: properly handle multi-byte
  characters when truncating NTM_MESSAGE environment variable to avoid
  splitting characters mid-rune.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
